paperTitle: LoLA: Long Horizon Latent Action Learning for General Robot Manipulation
organization: Institute of Microelectronics, CAS / UCAS / Microsoft Research

benchmarks.label: LIBERO
benchmarks.detail: Suites: libero goal 97.2 · libero object 99.6 · libero spatial 99.6 · libero 10 88.2 | Table 3 | Notes: All 4 LIBERO suites, 50 demos/task

benchmarks.label: SimplerEnv
benchmarks.detail: Suites: google robot vm 61.5 · google robot va 54.6 · widowx vm 71.9 | Tasks: pick coke can vm 88 · move near vm 71.7 · open close drawer vm 59.3 · place apple in drawer vm 26.9 · pick coke can va 83.2 · move near va 56.7 · open close drawer va 63.2 · place apple in drawer va 15.3 · put spoon on towel vm 95.8 · put carrot on plate vm 58.3 · stack green block on yellow block vm 54.2 · put eggplant in yellow basket vm 79.2 | Table 1, Table 2 | Notes: Standard SIMPLER VM/VA for Google Robot (4 tasks) and WidowX VM (4 tasks). 3-task avg for Google Robot suite scores.
